# Axelis Overseas Education — Study Abroad Consultancy

> Axelis Overseas (overseeducation.com) is a study abroad consultancy based in Bengaluru, India. We help Indian students pursue higher education at top universities across UK, USA, Ireland, Germany, France, Finland, and more.

## About Us

Axelis Overseas Education is a premium study abroad consulting firm that guides students through the entire journey of studying overseas — from university selection and applications to visa processing, scholarships, accommodation, and pre-departure support.

- **Founded**: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- **Website**: https://overseeducation.com
- **Contact**: axelisoverseas@overseeducation.com | info@overseeducation.com
- **Phone**: +91-9606930003

## Services

- **University Selection**: Personalized matching with 70+ partner universities across 6 countries
- **Application Management**: End-to-end application support for UG, PG, and PhD programs
- **Visa Assistance**: Complete visa application guidance and documentation support
- **Scholarship Guidance**: Help identifying and applying for merit and need-based scholarships
- **Education Loans**: Partnerships with major banks for competitive loan rates
- **Accommodation**: Housing support through verified accommodation partners
- **Career Counseling**: Course and career guidance based on student profiles
- **Test Preparation**: IELTS, TOEFL, GRE, GMAT preparation support

## Partner Countries

- 🇬🇧 United Kingdom (23 partner universities)
- 🇺🇸 United States of America (30+ partner universities)
- 🇮🇪 Ireland (10 partner universities)
- 🇩🇪 Germany (2 partner universities + public university programs)
- 🇫🇷 France (1 partner university)
- 🇫🇮 Finland (1 partner university)

## Key Partner Universities

### UK
Warwick University, University of Bath, University of Liverpool, University of Strathclyde, University of Surrey, University of East Anglia, Aston University, Coventry University, Edinburgh Napier University, University of Leicester, and more.

### USA
Arizona State University (#1 Innovation), Northeastern University, New York University (SPS & Steinhardt), Case Western Reserve University, Stevens Institute of Technology, Stony Brook University, Fordham University, Rochester Institute of Technology, Worcester Polytechnic Institute, Lehigh University, and more.

### Ireland
Trinity College Dublin (Top 100 World), University College Dublin, Dublin City University, University of Limerick, University of Galway, Maynooth University, National College of Ireland, Griffith College, and more.

### Germany
University of Europe for Applied Sciences, Berlin School of Business and Innovation, plus extensive public university programs via Uni-Assist.

## Popular Study Fields

- Computer Science & AI
- Engineering (Mechanical, Electrical, Civil)
- Business Administration & MBA
- Management & Marketing
- Data Science & Analytics
- Health Sciences & Pharmacy
- Design & Creative Industries

## Application Process

1. **Free Consultation**: Book a free counseling session via our website or WhatsApp
2. **Profile Assessment**: We evaluate your academic profile and preferences
3. **University Shortlisting**: Get matched with the best-fit universities
4. **Application Filing**: We handle all documentation and submissions
5. **Offer Acceptance**: Review and accept your admission offers
6. **Visa Processing**: Complete visa documentation and interview prep
7. **Pre-Departure**: Accommodation, travel, and orientation support
